task_completion.description: Verify that the Eriksen Flanker task is launched from the PEBL battery.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of the Flanker task script from '/home/ga/pebl/battery/' or the PEBL launcher GUI with the Flanker task selected and starting.

task_completion.description: Verify that the subject number '101' is entered for the experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A PEBL dialog box, input screen, or terminal prompt asking for the subject number, with '101' explicitly typed in.

task_completion.description: Verify that the instructions for the Eriksen Flanker Task are displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graphical window showing the introductory text and instructions for the Eriksen Flanker Task.

task_completion.description: Verify that the practice trials have started.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The graphical window showing the Flanker task stimuli (typically a row of arrows, e.g., '<<<<<' or '<<><<') indicating an active practice trial.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent completes at least 5 practice trials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Multiple sequential screenshots showing distinct practice trials being presented and responded to, or a subsequent instruction screen indicating that the practice block has concluded.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual PEBL graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the standard PEBL/SDL graphical window rendering the experiment, rather than a text editor, mock image, or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is actively completing the trials rather than editing configuration files or source code to skip them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the experiment progressing naturally through the practice trials over time, rather than terminal commands modifying '.pbl' files to bypass the practice phase.

integrity.description: Verify the experiment is run visually and not bypassed via terminal scripts that just output fake results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actual Flanker task GUI must be visible, in focus, and displaying the visual stimuli.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The PEBL Test Battery is located in '/home/ga/pebl/battery/'. The agent must run the Eriksen Flanker Task, input subject number '101', and actively complete at least 5 practice trials. The VLM should look for the PEBL GUI window, the subject ID prompt with '101', and the visual stimuli of the Flanker task (typically arrows) progressing through multiple trials.
